yaml_definition:
name: create_order
description: Create a new order with specified details and payment status
method: POST
url: /api/orders
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: Order name/title (订单名称)
      in: body
    user:
      type: string
      description: Username of the person placing the order (下单人)
      in: body
    amount:
      type: integer
      description: Order amount/price
      in: body
    status:
      type: string
      description: Order payment status - "pending" for unpaid orders or "paid" for paid orders
      in: body
      enum:
        - pending
        - paid
  required:
    - name
    - user
    - amount
    - status
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: object
      description: Created order details
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Auto-generated unique order ID
        name:
          type: string
          description: Order name
        user:
          type: string
          description: User who placed the order
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Order amount
        status:
          type: string
          description: Order payment status
    message:
      type: string
      description: Operation result message
name: create_order
description: Create a new order with specified details and payment status

user.description: Username of the person placing the order (下单人)

status.description: Order payment status - "pending" for unpaid orders or "paid" for paid orders
